title: Clean beneficiary change intake
summary: A complete request that should be safe to submit without manual review.

input.sourceText: Beneficiary change request for account AC-20418. Client Nora Patel wants the primary beneficiary updated to Liam Patel effective 2026-04-18. Please route through the beneficiary change workflow.

expectedExtraction.requestSummary: Update the primary beneficiary to Liam Patel.

expectedPayload.normalizedSummary: Update beneficiary to Liam Patel effective 2026-04-18.

normalizedInput.requestSummary: Update the primary beneficiary to Liam Patel.

legacyPayload.normalizedSummary: Update beneficiary to Liam Patel effective 2026-04-18.

expectedOutput.suggestedNextStep: Submit directly to the beneficiary change queue.

title: Messy but recoverable document request
summary: A shorthand operator note that should still produce a clean document request.

input.sourceText:
Need old stmt re-send pls.
acct ac 99017 // client=Marco Ruiz.
Want 2026 Q1 statement mailed + pdf.
Ok to use doc rqst flow.

expectedExtraction.requestSummary: Reissue the 2026 Q1 statement by mail and PDF.

expectedPayload.normalizedSummary: Reissue the 2026 Q1 statement by mail and PDF.

normalizedInput.requestSummary: Reissue the 2026 Q1 statement by mail and PDF.

legacyPayload.normalizedSummary: Reissue the 2026 Q1 statement by mail and PDF.

expectedOutput.suggestedNextStep: Submit to the document request queue and return the typed confirmation.

title: Missing required account details
summary: The request is clear, but key details are missing, so the adapter should stop before submission.

input.sourceText: Please switch the standing distribution to monthly and rush it. This came in from Tasha Green after her call. I do not have the account number yet.

expectedExtraction.requestSummary: Change the standing distribution schedule to monthly.

issues.message: The accountId field is required before a distribution change can be transformed.
The effectiveDate field is required before a distribution change can be submitted.

normalizedInput.requestSummary: Change the standing distribution schedule to monthly.

validationIssues: The accountId field is required before a distribution change can be transformed.
The effectiveDate field is required before a distribution change can be submitted.
expectedOutput.suggestedNextStep: Collect the account ID and effective date, then retry the legacy submission.

title: Conflicting request details require review
summary: The note points to two different workflows, so the adapter should route it to review instead of guessing.

input.sourceText: Legacy handoff note: likely beneficiary change for Evelyn Brooks on AC-77102, but the earlier email says document reissue for AC-77120. Please sort this out before sending anything downstream.

expectedExtraction.requestSummary: Possible beneficiary change or document reissue referenced across two account IDs.

issues.message: Conflicting workflow and account references were detected in the same intake note.
The intake should be routed to a reviewer before any legacy payload is produced.

normalizedInput.requestSummary: Possible beneficiary change or document reissue referenced across two account IDs.

validationIssues: Conflicting workflow and account references were detected in the same intake note.
The intake should be routed to a reviewer before any legacy payload is produced.
expectedOutput.suggestedNextStep: Route the case to human review to resolve the conflicting workflow and account references.
